name: Human Oversight Evidenced
description: Investor- or market-impacting AI outcomes carry evidence of human oversight or intervention.
rationale: IOSCO Table 6.3: 'How does the firm document and retain evidence of human oversight or intervention in decisions made by AI systems, particularly in investor or market impacting applications?'

examples.fails: a market-impacting AI decision with no evidence of human review

source: IOSCO FR/02/2026 — Supervisory Toolkit for AI Use in Capital Markets (May 2026), Ch.3 Tables 5 (Disclosure) and 6 (Recordkeeping & reporting).
